title: S + V + N + who/that + V（限定關係子句）

formulas.zh: 名詞（人）+ 關係代名詞who + 動詞...，who引導限定用法修飾人
名詞（人）+ 關係代名詞that + 動詞...，that引導限定用法修飾人

explanation: 關係代名詞who/that在限定用法中修飾先行詞（人），用以限定、縮小該人物的範圍。去掉who/that引導的子句後，句子意思會改變，說明該子句為不可或缺的限定資訊。who較正式，that較非正式，兩者在修飾人時常可互換，但在口語中that使用率高。留意：限定用法無逗號，非限定用法（補充說明）需加逗號。

examples.eng: The student who won the first prize is from Taipei.
examples.chi: 獲得第一名的學生來自台北。

examples.eng: We need employees that have at least three years of experience.
examples.chi: 我們需要至少有三年經驗的員工。

examples.eng: The teacher who teaches chemistry is very strict with us.
examples.chi: 教化學的那位老師對我們很嚴格。

examples.eng: Anyone that helps elderly people deserves our respect.
examples.chi: 任何幫助老年人的人都值得我們尊敬。

extension.tip: 判斷是否為限定用法：若刪除who/that子句後，句意不完整或範圍混亂，即為限定用法（無逗號）。非限定用法（加逗號）是補充說明，刪除後句意仍清楚。台灣學測考試常考限定用法的識別與翻譯。

examples.test: 限定：The man who called yesterday is my uncle.
examples.result: → 強調特定哪個男人（昨天打電話的那位），去掉子句意思改變，須用who，無逗號

examples.test: 非限定：My uncle, who called yesterday, is my uncle. (錯)
examples.result: → 應為『My uncle, who called yesterday, is visiting us.』，加逗號表補充說明

examples.test: who vs that：He is a lawyer who/that helps poor people.
examples.result: → 修飾人時兩者可互換，who較正式，that較口語；在限定用法中both acceptable

extension.note: 限定用法：無逗號、定義範圍；非限定用法：加逗號、補充資訊。記住『刪除子句後句意改變 = 限定』。

parts: the project last year is now the manager.
exercises.sentence: The woman who led the project last year is now the manager.
exercises.translation: 去年帶領這項專案的那位女性現在是經理。

exercises.sentence: We are looking for someone that is reliable and honest.
exercises.translation: 我們在尋找可靠又誠實的人。

exercises.sentence: All the students who passed the exam will receive awards next week.
exercises.translation: 所有通過考試的學生將在下週獲得獎項。

parts: is highly respected by his patients.
exercises.sentence: The doctor that treats serious diseases is highly respected by his patients.
exercises.translation: 治療重病的那位醫生受到患者高度尊敬。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的關係代名詞，完成下列句子
mc_exercises.question_eng: The teacher _______ helps us with homework is very patient.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是A (who)。先行詞為 teacher（人），限定關係子句中應用 who 作主詞。B項 which 用於修飾事物；C項 whose 表所有格；D項 whom 為受格，不適合作主詞。此為基礎題，考查 who 修飾人的用法。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇適當的關係代名詞，完成下列句子
mc_exercises.question_eng: We interviewed several candidates _______ had relevant work experience.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是B (that)。先行詞為 candidates（人），該限定關係子句用來縮小候選人範圍，應用 that 作主詞。A項 which 修飾物；C項 what 非關係代名詞；D項 how 為疑問副詞。that 在非正式口語中常用於修飾人。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的關係代名詞，完成下列句子
mc_exercises.question_eng: The director _______ film won the international award is coming to our school.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是B (whose)。先行詞為 director（人），空格後為 film（名詞），需要所有格 whose 來修飾。句意：「其電影獲得國際獎的導演」。A項 that 作主詞但後無動詞；C項 who 後缺連接詞；D項 which 修飾物而非人。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的關係代名詞，完成下列句子
mc_exercises.question_eng: The volunteers _______ we contacted yesterday agreed to help with the charity event.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是C (that)。先行詞為 volunteers（人），限定關係子句中 we 為主詞，空格處應填受格，可用 that（通常省略）或 whom。但 that 在口語中更常見，B項 whom 正式但較少用；A項 who 為主格；D項 which 修飾物。此題考查實際使用習慣。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我喜歡那位每天幫助同學的老師。
translation_exercises.answer: I like the teacher who helps classmates every day.
key_points: who helps classmates（限定關係子句）
hints: 句型框架：S + V + N + who + V...
注意：去掉who子句後，『我喜歡那位老師』意思不清楚，所以who子句是必要的限定資訊

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 那個贏得比賽的學生將代表學校參加全國競賽。
translation_exercises.answer: The student who won the competition will represent our school at the national contest.
key_points: who won the competition（限定關係子句）
hints: 句型框架：S（The student who won...）+ V（will represent）+ O
限定用法修飾特定學生，若去掉who子句，無法識別是哪位學生

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我們班上認真做功課的學生都被老師表揚了。
translation_exercises.answer: The students in our class who do their homework seriously were all praised by the teacher.
key_points: The students in our class（先行詞含修飾語）
who do their homework seriously（限定關係子句）
hints: 句型框架：S + who + V（限定子句修飾複數先行詞）+ V + O
注意：who引導子句後接動詞原形或一般現在式，主句動詞與先行詞人數一致

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 那些在社群媒體上分享虛假資訊的人應該為他們的行為負責。
translation_exercises.answer: The people who spread false information on social media should be responsible for their behavior.
key_points: who spread false information on social media（限定關係子句，修飾特定人群）
should be responsible for（情態動詞+形容詞）
hints: 句型框架：S（The people who...）+ 情態動詞 + V + complement
常見錯誤：容易誤用that而不用who，或在who後加be動詞（who are spreading...會變成進行式，改變原意）
